purpose: Per-episode viral layer: hook line, highlight scene, short-form title, rewatch bait. Apply at render/publish time.
format_note: hook_line = spoken before scene 1 narration. highlight_scene = scene number to cut as standalone Short. short_title = Shorts-optimized title for cold discovery. rewatch_bait = background detail that pays off later.

LO_EP001.hook_line: Little Zeus just got his first thunderbolt. He has no idea how to use it. This is going to be a problem.
LO_EP001.highlight_note: Scene 3 — first misfire. The look on everyone's faces.
LO_EP001.short_title: Baby Zeus Got a Thunderbolt and Immediately Destroyed Something ⚡😂 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP001.rewatch_bait: Archie is already looking at the camera in scene 1, frame 2. He knew.

LO_EP002.hook_line: There is a giant snake wrapped around Mount Olympus. Baby Hercules thinks he can fix it. He cannot fix it.
LO_EP002.highlight_note: Scene 4 — Hercules vs snake, the reversal moment.
LO_EP002.short_title: Baby Hercules vs a Giant Snake (He Made It Worse) 💪😬 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP002.rewatch_bait: Archie is on a high ledge in scene 1 — he moved there before the snake arrived.

LO_EP003.hook_line: Everything at the Olympus fountain turned to stone overnight. Perseus has a mirror. Medusa has opinions about this.
LO_EP003.highlight_note: Scene 3 — first mirror moment, stone fish reaction.
LO_EP003.short_title: Perseus Tries to Fix the Stone Fish Problem (It Gets Worse) 🪨😂 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP003.rewatch_bait: One fish in the background was already stone in scene 1 — before anyone noticed.

LO_EP004.hook_line: Athena had a perfect plan for the Olympic Games. Then Baby Hercules offered to help.
LO_EP004.short_title: Athena Had a Perfect Plan Until Hercules Helped 📜💥 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP004.rewatch_bait: Athena's three chin taps appear for the first time in scene 2 — plant for the whole series.

LO_EP005.hook_line: The fastest kid on Olympus just entered his first race. He's never lost anything in his life. Watch his heel.
LO_EP005.highlight_note: Scene 3 — race start, Achilles's confidence, the strap moment.
LO_EP005.short_title: The Fastest Kid on Olympus Just Had a Wardrobe Malfunction 🏃⚡ #LittleOlympus
LO_EP005.rewatch_bait: The loose strap is visible on Achilles's heel in scene 1 before anyone mentions it.

LO_EP006.hook_line: Everyone on Olympus keeps staring at Achilles's heel. He is completely fine. His heel is fine. Please stop looking at his heel.
LO_EP006.highlight_note: Scene 2 — the running joke debuts. 'It's fine. I'm fine. Everyone stop looking at my heel.'
LO_EP006.short_title: Why Does Everyone Keep Staring at Achilles's Heel?? 👀 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP006.rewatch_bait: Archie stares at the heel in every single scene he appears in. Nobody else notices Archie doing this.

LO_EP007.hook_line: Uncle Poseidon is visiting. He brought a gift. The gift is the entire ocean.
LO_EP007.highlight_note: Scene 4 — Poseidon swimming through the living room with six dolphins.
LO_EP007.short_title: Uncle Poseidon Accidentally Brought the ENTIRE Ocean to Olympus 🌊😭 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP007.rewatch_bait: One dolphin appears in the background of scene 1 — before Poseidon officially arrives.

LO_EP008.hook_line: Athena just found out her owl has never been trained a single day in his life. He has been doing all of this on pure instinct.
LO_EP008.highlight_note: Scene 5 — Archie's 11-second fix vs Athena's 45-second protocol. The wing gesture.
LO_EP008.short_title: This Owl Has Never Been Trained. He Just Fixed a Crisis in 11 Seconds. 🦉 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP008.rewatch_bait: In scene 1, Archie's head tilts are LEFT for 'no training' and RIGHT for 'I know what you're about to find.' He's answering a different question than she's asking.

LO_EP009.hook_line: Uncle Hades has never seen sunlight. He arrived at dawn. He brought the Underworld fog. By accident.
LO_EP009.highlight_note: Scene 3 — Zeus names the three-headed puppy Fluffy. The puppy's three reactions.
LO_EP009.short_title: Uncle Hades Brought His Dog. Zeus Named It Fluffy. Hades Didn't Object. 🐾 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP009.rewatch_bait: Hades's glasses prescription is shown in scene 1 — three different strengths. One pair for each head of the dog, confirmed in scene 3.

LO_EP010.hook_line: The ground is shaking again. It's not Hercules this time. Zeus knows exactly what it is, and he's not saying.
LO_EP010.highlight_note: Scene 6 — Zeus and Achilles at the mountaintop. Athena opens WHAT LIVES BELOW. The weight of it.
LO_EP010.short_title: Something Under Olympus Just Moved. Zeus Knows What It Is. 🌍 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP010.rewatch_bait: The Olympus Sea wave in scene 1 goes slightly the wrong direction. It's barely noticeable. It matters.

LO_EP011.hook_line: Hermes delivered every message this week. Fast. Perfect. Wrong address. All of them.
LO_EP011.highlight_note: Scene 3 — Zeus using an architecture textbook as a thunderbolt manual. It works.
LO_EP011.short_title: Hermes Delivered Every Message to the Wrong Person and Nobody Can Stop Him 📬😂 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP011.rewatch_bait: The dolphins in Athena's library (from Hermes's mix-up) are reading the scrolls. Background, scene 4.

LO_EP012.hook_line: Perseus went back to Medusa's garden. She remembered him. She had been counting the days.
LO_EP012.highlight_note: Scene 5 — Medusa asks Perseus to describe the eastern valley. She can't go there. He becomes her eyes.
LO_EP012.short_title: Medusa Asked Perseus to Describe Something She Can Never See 🪨💙 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP012.rewatch_bait: The stone owl on the better pedestal — Medusa placed it there between EP003 and EP012. She expected him to notice. He does.

LO_EP013.hook_line: Achilles won the championship by 60 meters. His stride shortened at 200 meters. He knows why. He's not saying.
LO_EP013.highlight_note: Scene 5 — 'I won, didn't I?' The running joke goes defensive. First time it's not a joke.
LO_EP013.short_title: Achilles Won By 60 Meters But Athena's Face Says Something Else 📊 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP013.rewatch_bait: Athena's chin taps happen twice during the race — at 200m mark. She already knows.

LO_EP014.hook_line: Baby Hercules has been lost for four hours. Someone found him. Someone nobody expected.
LO_EP014.highlight_note: Scene 4 — Medusa leads Hercules out by voice alone. No mirrors. She's helping.
LO_EP014.short_title: Baby Hercules Was Lost for 4 Hours. Guess Who Found Him. 🗺️ #LittleOlympus
LO_EP014.rewatch_bait: In scene 1, Medusa's garden has a path worn toward the east canyon edge. She knew this canyon long before Hercules showed up.

LO_EP015.hook_line: The ground has been shaking for three days. Zeus's father wrote back. The letter said: he knows. It's not time yet.
LO_EP015.highlight_note: Scene 6 — Zeus's father's reply. 'He knows. It's not time yet, but it will be. We'll know when.' The scroll closes.
LO_EP015.short_title: Zeus's Father Knows About the Titan. His Reply Has 7 Words. 📜 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP015.rewatch_bait: Athena's scroll goes from 5 pages to 7 pages in this episode. The last entry — WE WON'T FACE IT ALONE — is visible if you pause at the right moment.

LO_EP016.hook_line: Hercules just solved an engineering crisis perfectly, on the first try, with no explanation. It turns out he's been reading scrolls upside-down for 18 months.
LO_EP016.highlight_note: Scene 2 — 'I read it upside down.' Athena's face. The recalibration.
LO_EP016.short_title: Hercules Has Been Learning Engineering Upside-Down For 18 Months 📖🔄 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP016.rewatch_bait: In earlier episodes (EP004, EP008), Hercules is visible behind Athena, facing the wrong way. He was reading the whole time.

LO_EP017.hook_line: Zeus has entered every competition on Olympus and never won once. Today he decided that's not good enough anymore.
LO_EP017.highlight_note: Scene 5 — 'I want to be useful. Not entered. Useful.' One final perfect throw. He leaves.
LO_EP017.short_title: Zeus Stopped Entering Things for Fun. He Wants to Be Ready for Something. ⚡ #LittleOlympus
LO_EP017.rewatch_bait: Zeus's crown is straighter in every scene this episode. By scene 7 it's almost perfectly level. He's focused.

LO_EP018.hook_line: Athena was up for 36 hours. She found the final piece. She called everyone together. They'd all been preparing for this without knowing.
LO_EP018.highlight_note: Scene 3 — each person's role revealed. The realization that every episode this season was preparation.
LO_EP018.short_title: Athena Stayed Up 36 Hours and Found Out They Were Ready All Along 📜✨ #LittleOlympus
LO_EP018.rewatch_bait: The plan Athena shows uses each person's specific skills from specific earlier episodes. Every skill listed has an episode number attached to when they learned it.

LO_EP019.hook_line: Full moon is tomorrow. The plan is ready. But Achilles just told Zeus his heel is worse than he's been saying.
LO_EP019.highlight_note: Scene 4 — 'My heel is bad tonight.' Not 'I'm fine.' Zeus: 'How bad?' Achilles: 'Bad enough to tell you.'
LO_EP019.short_title: Achilles Stopped Saying He Was Fine. Zeus Listened. 💛 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP019.rewatch_bait: Every previous episode Achilles said 'I'm fine' — this is the ONLY episode he doesn't. Viewers who caught the running joke will notice immediately.

LO_EP020.hook_line: The full moon rose. The ground shook. And then — from the east valley — someone showed up that nobody had called.
LO_EP020.highlight_note: Scene 6 — Medusa seals the cracks. 'I said I would.' The invitation to the west garden.
LO_EP020.short_title: The Season Finale Everyone Was Ready For (And One Person Nobody Expected) 🌕 #LittleOlympus
LO_EP020.rewatch_bait: Archie's final camera look is the slowest blink in the entire series. Count the frames — it's three times longer than any previous blink. He's been waiting for this.

ML_EP001.hook_line: Before the war, there was silence. Before silence, there was one machine older than the city. This is the moment it woke up.
ML_EP001.highlight_note: Scene 4 — first transformation sequence. BLAZE becomes something nobody expected.
ML_EP001.short_title: A Machine Older Than the City Just Woke Up. Nothing Is the Same. 🤖⚡ #MechLegends
ML_EP001.rewatch_bait: RUMBLE's observation drone is visible in scene 1, upper right corner. He was there from the beginning.

ML_EP002.hook_line: RUMBLE studied BLAZE for weeks looking for his weakness. He found it. BLAZE has one move left.
ML_EP002.highlight_note: Scene 5 — the secret weapon reveal. The moment RUMBLE's face changes.
ML_EP002.short_title: RUMBLE Found BLAZE's Weakness. BLAZE's Response Changes Everything. ⚔️ #MechLegends
ML_EP002.rewatch_bait: RUMBLE's data screen in scene 2 shows BLAZE's weakness before it's named — visible if you pause.

ML_EP003.hook_line: RUMBLE studied one thing about BLAZE: he never leaves anyone behind. So RUMBLE used it as a trap.
ML_EP003.highlight_note: Scene 4 — GRANITE in danger, BLAZE's code activated against him, the impossible choice.
ML_EP003.short_title: RUMBLE Turned BLAZE's Best Quality Into a Weapon Against Him 🔴 #MechLegends
ML_EP003.rewatch_bait: GRANITE's sleeve first shows stress fractures in scene 2. Nobody mentions it. It matters in EP010.

ML_EP004.hook_line: While RUMBLE was studying the team, someone else was studying RUMBLE. From orbit. For eleven weeks.
ML_EP004.highlight_note: Scene 3 — NOVA's full analysis of RUMBLE revealed. She knows things they don't.
ML_EP004.short_title: Someone Was Watching RUMBLE the Entire Time and He Didn't Know 🛸 #MechLegends
ML_EP004.rewatch_bait: NOVA's ship appears as a moving dot in the sky of EP001 and EP003. She was already there.

ML_EP005.hook_line: NOVA said three weeks. RUMBLE built it in five days. This is what it does to a city.
ML_EP005.highlight_note: Scene 4 — Gravity Anchor deploys. The city-scale effect. RUMBLE says 'NOVA was right.' and walks away.
ML_EP005.short_title: RUMBLE Built His Weapon in 5 Days Instead of 3 Weeks. Then He Said One Thing. 🔴 #MechLegends
ML_EP005.rewatch_bait: RUMBLE walks away after getting the power grid map — his actual goal. The Gravity Anchor was cover.

ML_EP006.hook_line: NOVA saw the full weapon design before she came down. She didn't tell them everything. She had a reason.
ML_EP006.highlight_note: Scene 5 — RUMBLE planted a decoy schematic. NOVA knew. She used it. 12-hour margin.
ML_EP006.short_title: NOVA Knew About the Fake Plans the Whole Time. Here's Why She Didn't Say. 🔵 #MechLegends
ML_EP006.rewatch_bait: NOVA's first appearance in EP004 — her ship's approach angle matched the Resonance Tower's location exactly. She was already calculating.

ML_EP007.hook_line: Four components. Four locations. RUMBLE had proxy units at three of them and was at the fourth himself.
ML_EP007.highlight_note: Scene 6 — BLAZE powers down his jets and walks to the component. RUMBLE's line: 'Now I know you'll walk into a room I own if the component matters enough.'
ML_EP007.short_title: BLAZE Powered Down His Weapons and Walked Into RUMBLE's Room Anyway 🔥 #MechLegends
ML_EP007.rewatch_bait: RUMBLE's three proxy units are at the three hardest locations. He chose the fourth site — the easiest one — for himself. He was watching BLAZE the whole time.

ML_EP008.hook_line: RUMBLE designed the 14-hour window himself. He wanted to see exactly what they would do with it.
ML_EP008.highlight_note: Scene 7 — all engagement locations form a Titan Summoning Array symbol. NOVA sees it. The cliffhanger.
ML_EP008.short_title: RUMBLE Let Them Win on Purpose. The Map of Where They Fought Just Revealed Why. 🗺️🔴 #MechLegends
ML_EP008.rewatch_bait: The engagement locations appear in the background of NOVA's screens throughout EP005-EP008. The symbol was always there.

ML_EP009.hook_line: 12 weeks of battle locations. Connected as dots. It's not random. NOVA decodes it at 3am. RUMBLE is already at the last point.
ML_EP009.highlight_note: Scene 5 — RUMBLE activates the 12th point. COLOSSUS stirs. 31-hour countdown.
ML_EP009.short_title: NOVA Decoded RUMBLE's Map at 3AM. He Was Already at the Last Point. 🗺️⚠️ #MechLegends
ML_EP009.rewatch_bait: COLOSSUS's outline is visible in the city's oldest geological survey map — shown briefly in scene 2. Nobody's looking at it.

ML_EP010.hook_line: Something has been under the city for 3,000 years. Tonight it wakes up. RUMBLE knew it was there the whole time.
ML_EP010.highlight_note: Scene 4 — COLOSSUS emerges. Its face. It hasn't seen sky in 3,000 years. The expression is wonder, not rage.
ML_EP010.short_title: A 3,000-Year-Old Titan Just Emerged Under the City. Its First Expression Was Wonder. 🌍 #MechLegends
ML_EP010.rewatch_bait: ELDER-7's first arrival in scene 3 — the city's oldest mech, 2,800 years old — he recognizes COLOSSUS. He's seen this before.

ML_EP011.hook_line: RUMBLE left one node active on purpose. ELDER-7 — a mech older than the city — knows exactly why that's catastrophic.
ML_EP011.highlight_note: Scene 7 — RUMBLE's final direct message: 'I'll be watching. Good luck.' ELDER-7: 'In 3,000 years I have never heard a villain say good luck.'
ML_EP011.short_title: The Villain Said Good Luck. A 2,800-Year-Old Mech Had Thoughts About That. 🤖 #MechLegends
ML_EP011.rewatch_bait: ELDER-7's battle damage from 3,000 years ago matches the pattern of the original failed sealing attempt. He was there. He failed once. He knows what that felt like.

ML_EP012.hook_line: Four positions. One attempt. GRANITE's sleeve hits zero at 3 hours 38 minutes. The seal completed at 3 hours 37 minutes. One minute. That was the margin.
ML_EP012.highlight_note: Scene 6 — ELDER-7: 'It's done.' 3,000-year task complete. Then RUMBLE opens SEASON 2.
ML_EP012.short_title: The Seal Finished at 3:37. GRANITE's Sleeve Hit Zero at 3:38. One Minute. 🔒 #MechLegends
ML_EP012.rewatch_bait: RUMBLE's SEASON 2 document's first question: 'What can they do that they don't know they can do yet?' — this is the answer to every fight he's had with them all season. He wasn't trying to win. He was learning what their ceiling was.

global_rules.hook_delivery: Spoken before scene 1 narration. Also used as thumbnail text overlay and first-frame Short caption.
global_rules.highlight_clip_length: 15-30 seconds. Ends WITHOUT resolution — cut on the 'wait what' moment, not after the answer.
global_rules.highlight_upload_timing: 2-3 days after full episode upload. Rides the algorithm momentum.
global_rules.rewatch_bait_placement: Scene 2 or 3. Payoff in scene 6 or 7. Never in scene 1 (too obvious) or the final scene (too late).
